response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." "Zoo" was selected as one of the top five American films to be presented at the Directors' Fortnight sidebar at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival, while "Divine Trash" is a 1998 documentary film directed by Steve Yeager about John Waters. The success of "Zoo" is not directly comparable to "Divine Trash" due to differences in context and audience, but "Zoo" was more widely recognized and exhibited at major international film festivals.
